mapper.select:
SELECT space.id , space.deleted , space.created_at as createdAt , space.modified_at as modifiedAt
, space.work_name as workName , space.space_code as spaceCode
, tb_group.group_name as groupName
, (SELECT approval.id FROM approval WHERE space.id = approval.space_id AND approval.step_status != 'COMPLETED' AND approval.deleted = false LIMIT 1) as currentApprovalId FROM space LEFT JOIN tb_group ON space.group_id = tb_group.id WHERE space.id = #{id}
